prose: Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on water (H₂O, 3 atoms: O, H, H) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral closed-shell RKS). Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied water.xyz; no re-optimization was performed (single point). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy = true, all checks passed. HOMO = −8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV (headline value). Total electronic energy = −76.462901 Ha. The gap is a Koopmans-style orbital energy gap, not an excitation energy.
